---
title: "Section 2: Measures and Data"
id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02"
section_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02"
session_id: "OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01"
toc: True
---




### In this section
<br>

- [Observed Data](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02-sp01.qmd)

- [Relative Risk](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02-sp02.qmd)

- [Formula for Vaccine Effectiveness](OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02-sp03.qmd)

```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">

            <span class="nav-title">Key Public Health Questions</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="OUTBREAK_VE_DEMO-se01-sec02-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Observed Data</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
